mapper.select:
select count(0) from asset_lineage_node where node_type = 'DATABASE' and node_sub_type = 'TABLE' and (string_to_array(node_urn, ':'))[2] = #{req.option.dataSourceName}
and nodeName like concat('%',#{req.option.nodeName},'%')

select aln.node_urn, aln.node_name, aln.node_type, aln.node_sub_type, aln.node_prop, alr.resource_name, alr.resource_tag, alr.resource_type from ( select * from datafusion.asset_lineage_node where node_urn = #{nodeUrn}) aln left join datafusion.asset_lineage_node_resource_relation alnrr on aln.id = alnrr.node_id left join datafusion.asset_lineage_resource alr on alnrr.resource_id = alr.id

select id, node_urn, node_name, node_type, node_sub_type, node_prop, creator, updater, create_time, update_time from asset_lineage_node where node_urn in
#{nodeUrn}
select node_urn from asset_lineage_node where node_urn like concat('%:',#{datasourceName},':%') and node_urn like concat('%:',#{tableNameColumnName})
mapper.delete:
delete from asset_lineage_node where id in
#{id}
